data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of linkage to authorization and/or BAA when relevant. However, the evidence provided does not include any records or references that demonstrate this linkage, indicating a clear gap in the requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for such linkage but fails to provide any actual data or endpoints that fulfill this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of linkage to authorization and/or BAA.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
